_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: zeerekahmad
data.message:
Enable QOS Overrides to All Publishers (#131)

Enable QoS Overriding parameters on publishers, to increase the topic tool flexibility. Lets you, for example, apply a new QoS profile via the `relay` node

Signed-off-by: Zeerek <zeerek@polymathrobotics.com>
Co-authored-by: Emerson Knapp <emerson.b.knapp@gmail.com>

data.author: rcywongaa
data.message:
Add demux (#106)

* Copy, rename and make buildable

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Swap input and output topic

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Reset publisher if output topic changes

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Add tests

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Fix test failures

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Fix header guard

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Make linter happy

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Add README entry

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Remove lazy parameter

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Rename default input topic to ~/input

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Fix typo

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Remove usage of ament_cmake_auto

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Add missing dependency on ament_cmake

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Fix uncrustify warnings

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Add initial_topic_ variable to avoid confusion

This addresses comment
https://github.com/ros-tooling/topic_tools/pull/106#discussion_r1637020280

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Fix outtopic spelling

This addresses comment
https://github.com/ros-tooling/topic_tools/pull/106#discussion_r1637040958

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Add error message on incorrect number of arguments

Addresses
https://github.com/ros-tooling/topic_tools/pull/106#discussion_r1637033132

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

* Formatting

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Rufus Wong <rcywongaa@gmail.com>

data.author: dependabot[bot]
data.message:
Bump actions/upload-artifact from v1 to v2.2.3 Bumps [actions/upload-artifact](https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact) from v1 to v2.2.3.
Release notes

Sourced from actions/upload-artifact's releases.

v2.2.3

  • Fixes for proxy related issues
Commits
  • ee69f02 Bump @​actions/artifact to version 0.5.1 (#189)
  • bcd44ad Bump y18n from 4.0.0 to 4.0.1 (#186)
  • ea3d524 Merge pull request #173 from yacaovsnc/main
  • e95d1b9 update index.js
  • 0fbc4b7 Display a warning if user tries to upload over 10000 files
  • a1af2e8 Add on: pull_request trigger to CodeQL workflow (#165)
  • a4f98af Update README.md
  • 16b8b2b Update where does the upload go section (#162)
  • e448a9b Add retries to all HTTP calls + resolve dependabot alerts (#160)
  • e6bd6b7 Replace "file(s)" with "file" or "files" (#159)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
